title: Design System: Gawa Developer — Precision Workbench

display-hero.purpose: Homepage hero h1 only. EB Garamond weight 400. Fluid via clamp(2.5rem, 5.5vw, 4.75rem). Tracking -0.01em. The editorial signature — never bold. One italic word in text-accent is the only emphasis variation.

display-section.purpose: Section h2 headings. EB Garamond weight 400. Fluid via clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.75rem). Same weight as hero — restraint is consistent.

display-compact.purpose: Project titles, card h3 headings. EB Garamond weight 400. Fluid via clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 1.875rem).

display-metric.purpose: Large case-study impact numbers (e.g. '89%'). EB Garamond weight 400, no bold. Fluid via clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 5.5rem). Used once per section maximum — not a SaaS stat widget.

title-md.purpose: Card titles, service names, feature headings. Inter weight 500 at 20px — precision voice, not the editorial voice.

body-md.purpose: Default running text. Inter 16px weight 400, +0.16px tracking for editorial feel. max-width 58–65ch.

label-uppercase.purpose: Form field labels, process step classifiers, small badge text. Inter 10px weight 600, +0.08em tracking, all-caps. Used deliberately, not on every section heading.

button.purpose: All CTA pill labels. Inter 15px weight 600, neutral tracking.

nav-link.purpose: Top navigation links. Inter 15px weight 500, neutral tracking.

shadows.name: card-resting
shadows.purpose: Resting state for floating cards. Appears consistently — distinguishes cards from canvas.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Elevated hover state on WhyChooseUs and similar interactive cards.

motion.name: ease-smooth-reveal
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for scroll-triggered entrances and content reveals.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Material-standard easing for state transitions (hover, focus, border).

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered section reveals and content entrance.

motion.name: stagger-child
motion.purpose: Stagger offset between children in a list reveal.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.note: Feature cards 1-up, nav hamburger, hero h1 ~40px.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Full desktop layout, hero split 6/6 grid, feature cards 3-up.

components.name: Primary Button — Ink Pill
components.description: The primary conversion CTA. Near-black ink pill, white label. Used for 'Start Your Project' and 'Submit Inquiry'. Height 40px, pill radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #292524; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0c0a09; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0c0a09; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #292524; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Accent Button — Blue Pill
components.description: Blue accent CTA pill. Background #3567a0 (Steel Trust Blue), white text. Used for accent CTAs like the FAQ section CTA — secondary action that should read as trustworthy, not primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #3567a0; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #2a5286; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3567a0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button — Transparent Pill
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent background, 1px border-subtle, ink text. Lower emphasis than the ink pill. Used for 'View Services' scrolling links in hero.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 9px 19px; background: transparent; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #292524; background: rgba(12,10,9,0.03); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #292524; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: White CTA — Dark Band
components.description: White pill on the obsidian FinalCTA band. Large version — 56px height, 40px × 16px padding. Background white, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-white { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 56px; padding: 16px 40px; background: #ffffff; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-white:hover { background: #f0efed; } .ds-btn-white:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Inline classifier badge. Muted-surface fill, pewter text, uppercase label tracking. Used on service type labels and section classifiers — not as eyebrows on every heading.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; background: #f0efed; color: #6b6a63; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Reason Card — Why Choose Us
components.description: WhyChooseUs grid card. Canvas background, 1px hairline border, 16px radius, 28px padding. Icon in muted rounded square, title in Inter 500, body in Inter 400 text-secondary. Single shadow lifts on hover.
components.html:
⚡

Fast Delivery

We ship in weeks, not months, using agile sprints with weekly progress reports.
components.css: .ds-reason-card { background: #f5f5f5; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-reason-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07); } .ds-reason-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; aspect-ratio: 1/1; background: #f0efed; border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 20px; } .ds-reason-title { color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-reason-body { color: #4e4e4e; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; margin: 0; max-width: 40ch; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.description: FAQ accordion. Closed: white surface, hairline border. Open: accent/8 tint background, accent/30 border. Chevron rotates 180° on open.
components.html: Most projects range from 6 to 16 weeks depending on scope and complexity.
components.css: .ds-faq-item { border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; background: #ffffff; overflow: hidden; } .ds-faq-open { background: rgba(53,103,160,0.08); border-color: rgba(53,103,160,0.30); } .ds-faq-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 20px 24px; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #0c0a09; text-align: left; gap: 12px; } .ds-faq-chevron { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; fill: none; stroke: #6b6a63; stroke-width: 2; transition: transform 0.2s; } .ds-faq-open .ds-faq-chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); } .ds-faq-panel { padding: 0 24px 20px; color: #4e4e4e; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; }

components.name: Tech Badge
components.description: Inline technology label in project case studies. White surface, hairline border, pill shape, text-secondary. Sits in flex-wrap row below project description.
components.css: .ds-tech-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #4e4e4e; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.47; letter-spacing: 0.15px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: 64px nav bar. Transparent at page top, transitions to brand-dark (#0c0a09) on scroll. Wordmark left, minimal links center, ink pill CTA right. Mobile: wordmark + hamburger, full-screen overlay menu.
components.html:
Gawa Developer
  • Home
  • Contact
Start Your Project
components.css: .ds-topnav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-wordmark { color: #0c0a09; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-muted { color: #6b6a63; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { color: #0c0a09; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { opacity: 0.55; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Canonical form field. White background, hairline border, 8px radius, 44px height. Focus: border shifts to accent blue. Labels in Inter 500.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6a63; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3567a0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(53,103,160,0.12); }

narrative.overview:
Gawa Developer is a software development agency — not a personal portfolio. The site's sole job is converting visitors into qualified leads. The design reads like a precision workshop at first light: clean surfaces, clear purpose, every element deliberate.

The base canvas is off-white (#f5f5f5) — neutral editorial paper. Near-black ink (#0c0a09) provides the primary CTA pill and deepest text. The accent is a muted steel trust blue (#3567a0): measured, professional, calm — not electric SaaS cobalt. It appears on trust signals, FAQ interactive states, and key copy emphasis. Five atmospheric gradient orbs (mint, peach, lavender, sky, rose) drift through hero backgrounds as the only chromatic decoration — they carry no content, they are pure atmosphere.

Display type runs EB Garamond at weight 400. This editorial serif at its native weight reads with authority and warmth without feeling heavy. Inter handles body, navigation, forms, and buttons — the workhorse paired against the serif signature. The primary CTA is an ink pill — near-black, restrained, earning its conversion role through placement and hierarchy rather than color saturation.

This system rejects: gradient-heavy SaaS hero dashboards with large metric widgets; overcrowded agency sites without hierarchy; dark-canvas dev-portfolio aesthetics that prioritize mood over conversion; and sites where every section gets uppercase tracked eyebrows.
keyCharacteristics: Off-white canvas (#f5f5f5) — neutral editorial paper, not warm cream.
Warm near-black ink (#0c0a09) — primary CTAs, deepest text, scrolled-nav background.
Steel trust blue (#3567a0) — the one accent. Trust signals, accent CTAs, FAQ open states, key italic copy in text-accent. Muted and professional, not electric.
EB Garamond weight 400 for all display copy — editorial authority, never bold.
Inter at 400/500/600 for body, nav, forms, buttons. +0.15–0.16px letter-spacing on body.
Atmospheric gradient orbs (mint/peach/lavender/sky/rose) — decoration only, never content containers.
Pill geometry (9999px) for all CTAs and badges; 16px radius for content cards.
96px section rhythm with generous editorial pacing.

rules.name: The Ink Pill Rule
rules.body: The primary conversion CTA uses near-black ink (#292524). 'Start Your Project' and 'Submit Inquiry' are always ink pills. The ink earns attention through placement and hierarchy — not through color saturation.

rules.name: The Blue Accent Rule
rules.body: Steel trust blue (#3567a0) is the site's one saturated moment. It appears on: trust-signal accents ('text-accent' italic copy), accent CTA pills (e.g. FAQ 'Book a Consultation'), FAQ active/open states, and outcome callout borders. It should NOT appear on primary conversion CTAs — those stay ink. Blue signals trust; ink signals commitment.

rules.name: The Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Gradient orbs are decoration only. They appear as soft radial blooms behind copy — never as button fills, text colors, or card backgrounds. Their rarity is what gives them visual impact.

rules.name: The Weight-400 Doctrine
rules.body: Display type stays at EB Garamond weight 400. Bolding any display headline shifts the voice from editorial authority to consumer-marketing loudness. The signature is in the editorial weight.

rules.name: The Italic Accent Rule
rules.body: One italic word per display headline, wrapped in 'text-accent' (#3567a0), is the only copy emphasis variation allowed. It functions like a hand-drawn underlining in a notebook — deliberate, sparse, earned.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards show shadow at resting state for definition. The hover state reveals a deeper shadow tier. Depth is earned through interaction, not decoration.

rules.name: The Pill-or-Rectangle Rule
rules.body: CTAs and badges use pill geometry (border-radius: 9999px). Content cards use 16px rounded rectangles. These two shapes are the entire border-radius vocabulary.

dos: Do use the ink pill (#292524) for primary conversion CTAs. It earns attention through placement, not color.
Do use steel trust blue (#3567a0) deliberately — on trust signals, accent CTAs, FAQ open states, and one italic word in key headlines.
Do use EB Garamond at weight 400 for every display headline. Never bold display copy.
Do set Inter at +0.15–0.16px letter-spacing for body text.
Do use fluid clamp() for heading sizes and max-w-[58–65ch] for body text.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 headings.
Do use atmospheric gradient orbs (mint/peach/lavender/sky/rose) as radial background decoration only.
Do set aspect-ratio: 1/1 on circular elements to prevent CLS on mobile.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display headings and text-wrap: pretty on long prose paragraphs.
donts: Don't bold EB Garamond display copy. Weight 400 is non-negotiable.
Don't use the steel blue (#3567a0) for primary conversion CTAs. Ink pill is the conversion signal.
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Use solid color or weight/size for emphasis.
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section heading. One deliberate badge per feature.
Don't use border-left stripes as card accents. Use full border, background tint, or nothing.
Don't animate layout-triggering CSS properties. Motion only via transform and opacity.
Don't use atmospheric gradient orbs as button fills, text colors, or card surfaces.
Don't hardcode hex values for design tokens. Use Tailwind class utilities (text-accent, bg-brand-dark, border-border-subtle).
